---
title: "axe-check.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/docs/site_libs/quarto-html/axe/axe-check.js"
loc: 128
complexity: 6
logic_score: 5.20
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.56
overall_score: 3.25
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `QuartoAxeReporter`
- `QuartoAxeJsonReporter`
- `QuartoAxeConsoleReporter`
- `QuartoAxeDocumentReporter`
- `violationElement`
- `descriptionElement`
- `helpElement`
- `nodesElement`
- `nodeElement`
- `targetElement`
- `element`
- `element`
- `violations`
- `reportElement`
- `noViolationsElement`
- `reporters`
- `QuartoAxeChecker`
- `axe`
- `result`
- `reporter`
- `init`
- `init`
- `opts`
- `jsonOptions`
- `checker`
